stimulus:
[Line graph: Recreation Visits by Month to Four UK National Parks during the Peak Season in 2022 (June, July, August), in thousands.]

  • Lake District: June 950, July 1,250, August 1,400
  • Snowdonia: June 480, July 690, August 760
  • Peak District: June 720, July 870, August 990
  • Brecon Beacons: June 310, July 420, August 470

According to the graph, the UK national park with the most recreation visits in August 2022 was ______
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the graph to complete the text?
rationale:
Choice B is correct because the Lake District had the most August visits at 1,400 thousand, more than any other park shown.

Choice A is incorrect: Peak District had 990 thousand in August. Choice C is incorrect: Snowdonia had 760 thousand. Choice D is incorrect: Brecon Beacons had only 470 thousand.
